titleStmt.title: SII 24.234: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 234. (A.R. No. 28 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a similar sale of garden-land to the bhaṭṭas by Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ alias Aṇukkavillidāsaṉ, a dāsanambi of Tiruvaraṅgam-Tiruppati. Among the boundaries of the land sold is mentioned the garden of Kulaśēkhara Brahmārāyar alias Chollāppiḷḷai, a Śrīpādaṁtāṅgum-nambi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉaEngraved below No. 233. tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarku yāṇṭu 2 vatu Iraṇṭāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cevvāyk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil dāsanampimāril karumāṇikkāḻvāṉāṉa Aṇukkavillidāsaṉeṉ tirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntara
pāṇṭiya tevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāmac caturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaipaṟṟil(t) teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāṉa tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkkellai dāsa nampimāril piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷ dāsan tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai śrīpātantāṅkum nampimāri
l collāppiḷḷaiyāṉa kulacekarabrahmārāyar tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum Āka naṭuvuṭpaṭa Eṉṉutāṉa tirunantavaṉam mikutikkuṟai Uṭpaṭa maranilaiyum viḷainilamum Uṭpaṭak kiḻmel kol 10 5nta Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉaiñ cemukkālukkum kol 1 kku U 10 4 Āka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci U 2 100 2 10(1/2) I
ppaṇam Irunūṟṟu Irupataraiyum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak kaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku Aṇukkavilli dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉaiñce mukkālil meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ ki(ḻ)ṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol patiṉaiñce mukkālu
kkum Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟu Irupataraiyume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavum kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku Aṇukkavilli dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta I pramāṇappaṭi mulliyamāṉa
paṇam Irunūṟṟu Irupataraiyum bharatar pakkalile kaikkoḷḷukaiyil Ituve kraya davyac celavu kaiyyiṭāvatākak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmac caturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Aṇukkavilli dāsaṉeṉ Ivvaṇukkavilli dāsan samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai Āṇṭapiḷḷai Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam
Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai perumākkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Itu talaic caṅkāṭṭu Āyattevar samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai tirumaṅkai nampi Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ śrī vaikunta dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruccolaip piccaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
